name: Possible Info Stealer via DLL Side Loading
description: Detects DLL side loading associated with the OpenVPN executable, which launches a Chromium-based browser with the remote debugging port set. This behavior is linked to information stealers, such as Lumma Stealer, and may indicate attempts to exfiltrate sensitive data.

filterSets.name: Possible Info Stealer via DLL Side Loading

author: Ahmed Kamal & Mohamed Fahmy
